title: Isolation and quantitative analysis of thiophenes from Tαetes species by HPLC†
author: V. H. K. Verma
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Natural Plant Products Division, Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology, Palampur-176 061, India 

  E-mail  : director@csihbt.ren.nic.in   Fax : 91-1894-30433 

  Manuscript received 1 March 2001. accepted 12 November 2001  

 Quantitative evaluation of thiophenes content in three Tαgetes species, viz.  T. minuta ,  T. patula  and  T. erecta  has been carried by HPLC. Six compounds, namely, 2,2 '  : 5'2 " -terthienyl, 5-(3-buten-1-ynyl-2,2'-bithienyl), β-sitosterol, stigmasterol, octacosanol and 3· octacosanylstigmasterol have also been isolated from  Tαgetes minuta  roots.
